reference: I am a chronic back pain sufferer with depression and bipolar disorder. I take Morphine Sulfate Extended Release daily and recently broke my hand. I was put on Vicodin and then I broke out with cysts under my arm and was put on Vicodin again. All of these conditions were painful. I am afraid the doctors will think I am an addict and refuse my Morphine Sulfate Extended Release for my back pain. Can this happen?
text: I am a chronic back pain sufferer with depression and bipolar disorder. I take morphine sulfate extended release daily and recently broke my hands. I was put on Vicodin and then I broke out with cysts under my arm and was put on Vicodin again. All of these conditions were painful. I am afraid the doctors will think I am an addict and refuse my morphine sulfate extended release for my back pain. Can this happen?
